content.full_text:
April 23, 2001

John Brown
City Attorney, City of San Jacinto
Best, Best & Krieger LLP
P.O. Box 1028
Riverside, California 92502-1028

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-050

Dear Mr. Brown,

Pursuant to a telephone message on April 20, 2001 from Kim Byron of your office, we are withdrawing your request for advice. In lieu of written advice, you received oral informal assistance on April 4, 2001, regarding the public generally exception.

Sincerely,

Julia Bilaver
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
